description: Human-style multi-turn dialogs for eval or gold data. Assistant lines are plausible bot replies (not from production). expected_end_order_state uses the cart shape {"items": [{"name", "quantity", "modifier"}]} consistent with BotInteractionRequest.order_state in this repo. Item display names follow data/inventory.json where they differ from tests/smash_n_wings_menu.json (e.g. Jalapeno Poppers). Modifier strings are human-readable targets — your pipeline may normalize combo and radio labels.

conversation.content: Heyy good afternoon
Hey there! Welcome to Smash n Wings. What can I get started for you today?

cases.title: Greeting plus first burger order

conversation.content: Hi! Sorry I'm running late — can I still order for pickup?
No worries, we can take a pickup order. What would you like?
Awesome. One Hot Honey Burger, double patty please, and no lettuce bun — regular bun is fine.
Got it: one Hot Honey Burger, Double, lettuce bun declined. Want fries as a combo or no thanks on the combo side?
Plain fries with the combo, thanks.
Added. I've got your burger with Double patties, combo with Plain Fries. Anything else?

cases.notes: Combo and lettuce-bun choices are required groups on the fixture menu; modifier string is illustrative — your matcher may normalize wording.

conversation.content: Quick question — what's the difference between the Classic and the Hot Honey burger? I'm torn.
Classic is more of a straight-up smash build; Hot Honey adds the sweet heat profile (hot honey, jalapeños, that vibe). Want me to read toppings for either one?
Hot honey sounds perfect. One of those, single patty, no combo.
One Hot Honey Burger, Single, no combo on the fries add-on. Anything else tonight?
Can I do a 12 piece boneless, hot honey flavor, and an order of jalapeno poppers?
12 boneless with Hot Honey, plus Jalapeno Poppers. Want those wings as a combo with fries or keep them as-is?
No combo on the wings, I'm good.
Perfect, added both items.

cases.title: Modify item after it is in the cart

conversation.content: I'll take an All American, double, combo with cajun fries.
Locked in: All American, Double, combo with Cajun Fries. Lettuce bun preference?
No thanks on lettuce bun.
Thanks — noted No Thanks on lettuce bun.
Actually can you throw beef bacon on that burger if it's not too late?
Yep, I added Beef Bacon as an add-on on your All American.

items.name: All American
items.modifier: Double, Cajun Fries, No Thanks, Beef Bacon

conversation.content: One Classic burger, single patty, plain fries combo, no lettuce bun.
Classic, Single, Plain Fries combo, lettuce bun no thanks. Want anything else?
You know what, scratch the Classic — swap it for a Hot Honey Burger same build (single, same fries, same lettuce bun choice).
Swapped: removed Classic and added Hot Honey Burger with the same selections.
Double Hot Honey burger, no combo, and mozzarella sticks.
Added both. Lettuce bun — lettuce wrap or no thanks?
No thanks.
Got it.
On second thought drop the mozzarella sticks, we're trying not to over-order.
Removed Mozzarella Sticks. Your order is just the Double Hot Honey Burger with no combo.
Boneless wings, lemon pepper, 6 pieces please.
6 boneless with Lemon Pepper Seasoning. Combo fries with that?
No thanks on combo.
Sounds good.
Wait we're hungrier — bump those wings to 12 pieces, same flavor.
Updated to 12 boneless wings, Lemon Pepper Seasoning, still no combo.

cases.title: Review then confirm order

conversation.content: Chicken Shawarma - Smash Way, one, and a can coke.
Added Chicken Shawarma - Smash Way and Can Coke. Want to review?
Yeah read it back.
You have 1x Chicken Shawarma - Smash Way and 1x Can Coke.
Perfect — that's exactly right, go ahead and place it.
Confirmed. I'll send that through for pickup prep. Name for the order?

cases.notes: confirm_order does not clear items in this gold snapshot; cart stays as confirmed contents.

cases.title: Chicken sub combo then modify modifier choice

conversation.content: Chicken Sub (throwback to 2008), extra chicken yes, combo with lemon pepper fries.
Chicken Sub with Extra Chicken and Lemon Pepper Fries combo. Optional apps or drinks?
Just the sub combo, thanks.
Got it, nothing optional added.
Sorry — change the fries to plain fries instead of lemon pepper.
Updated combo fries to Plain Fries.

cases.title: Cancel entire order after building a cart

conversation.content: Triple All American, nashville seasoning fries combo, lettuce bun no thanks.
Triple All American with Nashville Seasoning Fries combo, no lettuce bun. Anything else?
Add bone-in breaded wings, 12 piece, buffalo.
12 bone-in breaded wings Buffalo flavor added.
Ugh we have to leave — cancel the whole order please.
No problem, I've cleared your cart. Hope to catch you next time!

cases.title: Off-topic chatter then back to food

conversation.content: Hey! Lions game was wild last night lol
Haha fair — I'm here for food orders though. Want to grab anything from the menu?
Right sorry — 2 chicken sandos and fries, the meal with Nashville seasoning on the fries, spicy on the chicken.
Two Chicken Sandos & Fries with Nashville on fries and Spicy heat level. Want add-ons?
Nope that's it.
You're all set with that item.

cases.notes: Fixture item name is '2 Chicken Sandos & Fries' in tests/smash_n_wings_menu.json; Clover inventory may label differently — adjust gold if your loader canonicalizes another string.

conversation.content: Are you guys open late tonight? And is everything halal?
We can share store hours and halal info from the restaurant profile. Want to place an order too?
Not yet, just checking — thanks!
Anytime. Ping us when you're ready.
Can I get a hot dog and regular fries — and is 6:45 pickup realistic if I order now?
Added Hot Dog and Regular Fries. Pickup timing depends on the kitchen queue; I can note 6:45 as your goal if the store allows.
I was charged twice last week and I'm not doing this over text with a bot — get me a real person.
I'm really sorry that happened. I'll flag a teammate to reach out about billing. If you still want food, tell me what to add.

cases.title: Busy family order: multiple intents in one thread

conversation.content: Morning! Feeding teenagers — need bone-in breaded wings 18pc, garlic parm, no combo.
18 bone-in breaded wings, Garlic Parm, no combo. Second flavor slot opens at 18pc — want a second flavor or keep it single-flavor?
Single flavor is fine. Also does the Hot Honey burger come really spicy or more sweet?
It's more sweet-heat than blow-your-head-off spicy, unless you add extra heat elsewhere.
Good — add one single Hot Honey burger, no combo, no lettuce bun.
Added the burger. Your cart has the wings and the Hot Honey Burger.
Make the wings 24 pieces instead, same flavor setup if that's allowed.
Updated wings to 24 pieces, Garlic Parm.
Looks good — confirm it please.
Confirmed for the kitchen: 24pc bone-in Garlic Parm + Hot Honey Burger Single.
